_source: Finnish word forms from Wiktionary (en.wiktionary.org) via the kaikki.org machine-readable extract; example sentences from Tatoeba (tatoeba.org). Curated for Finnish-Kids-Game from desskit/Finnish-Inflection-Drill.

examples.en: Would you want something to eat?
The farm animals are drinking at the watering place.
to put to bed, put to sleep
We advanced by jumping from one rock to the next.
to go to sleep, go to bed
The train is coming from Turku to Helsinki.
Did you see that airplane flying low?
Take the glass from the table.
Take the glass from the cupboard.
Can you read me a story?
Bathing in the sea is considered healthy.
I can help you do it. / I can help you to do it. / I can help you in doing it.
He helps his neighbor with his renovation.
to sit on the chair / to be sitting on the chair
I was standing on the platform waiting for the train.
I always walk up the stairs.
I opened a bag of chips.
What did I have to buy from the store again?
I didn't hear the alarm clock in the morning.
Can you still hear (the chirping of) crickets?
Have you listened to the newest episode yet?
My youngest child is just learning to speak.
We talked for at least an hour.
Did she say anything about it to you?
I will ask her/him about Pekka.

examples.fi: Kysyimme heiltä avusta, jota he lupasivat.
examples.en: We asked them about the help they promised.
Did you find what you were looking for?
What did you do? / What have you done? (scolding tone)
I will receive a parcel tomorrow.
I got a letter from my cousin.
Could you bring me the calendar?
Could you take out the trash?
A bird flies by flapping its wings.
We flew to the Canary Islands for spring break.
to wash clothes, do the laundry
to reduce (decrease the liquid content of food by boiling much of its water off)
A painter was painting the house white.
The book paints a dark picture of the future.
to laugh one's head off, split one's sides

examples.fi: Jos sää on huono, minä vain nauran sille.
examples.en: If the weather is bad, I'll just laugh it off.

examples.fi: Etkö muista, että minäkin olin siellä?
examples.en: Don't you remember that I was there too?
I remember what happened yesterday well.
I want to learn to ski.
I want to get to know you.
Could you teach that song to me?
to look forward (to), to anticipate with enthusiasm
to look forward (to), to anticipate with interest
This hotel was built last year.
The car was repaired to like-new condition.
I woke up to the noise of my neighbor again.
(The) old memories come back to life.
